title: New CVEs in the v1.12.0 release
body:
The v1.12.0 release has the following CVEs. Could we get a new release with the CVEs patched please?

- CVE-2023-30551 https://github.com/sigstore/rekor/security/advisories/GHSA-2h5h-59f5-c5x9
- CVE-2023-33199 in github.com/sigstore/rekor:1.1.1
- CVE-2021-21284 in github.com/vbatts/tar-split:0.11.3 (Jfrog false positive)

comments.body:
Thanks for your report.

At least the two Rekor ones don’t apply to any code shipped in Skopeo. CVE-2021-21284 seems to be something in moby/moby, I can’t see how that relates to tar-split at all.

Thanks! Jfrog confirmed CVE-2021-21284 for tar-split was a false positive. We can ignore that one.

Is there an update for Rekor? Otherwise, I can have Jfrog ignore them.
> At least the two Rekor ones don’t apply to any code shipped in Skopeo.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
